expect: Build epidemic-style spread detector on citation graph: compute R0 for zombie lessons (Sharpe<2), compare to healthy lessons. Zombie R0 > 1.0 means contamination is self-sustaining. Healthy R0 should be higher (>2.0). Test if compact.py reduces zombie R0.
actual: PARTIALLY FALSIFIED. Zombie R0=2.799 but SIR STRUCTURALLY WRONG: citation carries NO quality penalty (P_superior=0.349, Sharpe 8.11 vs 8.17). 377/385 infected RECOVERED. Only 8/791 truly infected.
diff: Expected epidemic contamination: FALSIFIED. Citation is reference not transmission. Zombies are old (S269) not contagious.
